block.supertntmod.bedrock_tnt.tooltip: Destroys EVERYTHING in 25 block radius - even bedrock!
block.supertntmod.emerald_tnt.tooltip: Rains emeralds, diamonds, gold and lapis
block.supertntmod.lightning_tnt.tooltip: Summons 20 lightning bolts in a storm
block.supertntmod.freeze_tnt.tooltip: Turns water to ice, covers ground with snow
block.supertntmod.wood_tnt.tooltip: Destroys trees, they regrow after 1 minute
block.supertntmod.command_tnt.tooltip: Hold a block + right-click to set target, sneak + right-click to change radius
block.supertntmod.tnt_door.tooltip: First user becomes owner, opens normally for them
block.supertntmod.tnt_door.tooltip2: Non-owners get a warning, then BOOM!
block.supertntmod.encrypted_tnt_chest.to: Password-protected chest, only owner can open
block.supertntmod.walking_tnt.tooltip: Follows players who make eye contact
block.supertntmod.walking_tnt.tooltip2: Explodes on contact! Owner is safe.
block.supertntmod.mob_freeze_tnt.tooltip: Freezes ALL hostile mobs for 10 minutes
block.supertntmod.water_tnt.tooltip: Extinguishes fires, pushes entities with water wave
block.supertntmod.rainbow_tnt.tooltip: Transforms blocks into colorful wool (30 block radius)
block.supertntmod.lego_tnt.tooltip: Builds structures from real Lego bricks with studs!
block.supertntmod.makarna_tnt.tooltip: Transforms blocks into edible food blocks - bon appetit!
block.supertntmod.seker_tnt.tooltip: Creates a candy & chocolate world + speed boost!
block.supertntmod.shrink_tnt.tooltip: Shrinks all nearby entities to tiny size!
block.supertntmod.growth_tnt.tooltip: Grows all nearby entities to giant size!
block.supertntmod.cleanse_tnt.tooltip: Removes all effects and size changes
block.supertntmod.fake_tnt.tooltip: A delicious cake... or is it?
item.supertntmod.tnt_frisbee.tooltip: Throwable TNT - destroys in + pattern, returns to you
item.supertntmod.tunneling_item.tooltip: Right-click blocks to drill tiny holes when shrunk to 1/12 scale
item.supertntmod.tunneling_item.too_larg: Too large to tunnel! Must be 1/12 scale or smaller.
item.supertntmod.tunneling_item.granted: You received a Tunneling Tool! Right-click blocks to drill through them.
item.supertntmod.portal_gun.tooltip: Shoots portals - first pink, then green. Walk through to teleport!
item.supertntmod.among_us_report.tooltip: Right-click any mob or player to instantly eliminate them!
block.supertntmod.proximity_mine.tooltip: Explodes when any living entity comes within 2 blocks. You have 2 seconds to run!
item.supertntmod.grappling_hook.tooltip: Right-click to launch — latches onto blocks and pulls you there instantly!
block.supertntmod.magnet_tnt.tooltip: Pulls all nearby entities toward it for 3 seconds, then BOOM!
block.supertntmod.gravity_tnt.tooltip: Inverts gravity for nearby entities for 10 seconds — enjoy the fall!
block.supertntmod.invisible_tnt.tooltip: Disguised as stone — nobody suspects a thing!
block.supertntmod.swap_tnt.tooltip: Randomly teleports all nearby entities to each other's positions!
block.supertntmod.bounce_tnt.tooltip: Launches ALL nearby entities sky-high! No block damage.
item.supertntmod.shrink_ball.tooltip: Throw at your feet to shrink yourself! Does not affect others.
item.supertntmod.grow_ball.tooltip: Throw at your feet to grow yourself! Does not affect others.
item.supertntmod.shrink_potion.tooltip: Throw at an entity to shrink it! Scale Lock blocks the effect.
item.supertntmod.grow_potion.tooltip: Throw at an entity to grow it! Scale Lock blocks the effect.
item.supertntmod.scale_lock.tooltip: Hold or equip to block all scale-changing effects!
item.supertntmod.drawing_item.tooltip: Right-click to draw — your art becomes real lego blocks! 16 layers of depth.
block.supertntmod.mirror.tooltip: Glows when placed! Endermen looking at it attack themselves.
block.supertntmod.light_bomb.tooltip: Glows and destroys ALL hostile mobs within 100 blocks every second (players included!)
item.supertntmod.spicy_chips.tooltip: Eat and zoom! Grants Speed III for 20 seconds.
item.supertntmod.energy_crystal.tooltip: Right-click: breaks bedrock! New bedrock spawns below each broken layer.
item.supertntmod.energy_crystal.broken: Bedrock broken! A new layer emerged below.
item.supertntmod.lightning_spell.tooltip: Right-click to strike lightning where you look! 64 block range.
item.supertntmod.craft_axe.tooltip: Break 1: record position. Break 2: build a wall between them.
item.supertntmod.craft_axe.first_set: First point set: [%d, %d, %d]. Now break the second point.
§aYou are now the owner of this chest! Type your password in chat:
§cThis chest doesn't belong to you! BOOM!
§aPassword set! Your chest is now protected.
message.supertntmod.tnt_door.owner_set: You are now the owner of this TNT door!
message.supertntmod.tnt_door.warning: §c⚠ WARNING: This door doesn't belong to you! Try again and it will explode!
message.supertntmod.tnt_door.not_owner: §c💥 This door doesn't belong to you! BOOM!
advancement.supertntmod.root.title: Super TNT World
advancement.supertntmod.ice_age.title: Ice Age
advancement.supertntmod.ice_age.descript: Obtain both Freeze TNT and Mob Freeze TNT
